# Correct answer: VERDICT GENUINE. local_consistency_report = [] (0 inconsistent lines across both halves).

=== Bridge: the digest above becomes the message hash for the signature check below ===
z = digest interpreted as a 256-bit integer, reduced mod the P-256 curve order n = 105801587188948010289915405016346968920988038160452455280980121897906731716854

=== Part 2: verify a real P-256 signature fragment over that digest ===
